entity: BBR source abbreviation BUF (Buffalo Braves 1970-78) is the same franchise as warehouse canonical SDC (San Diego Clippers 1978-84) and LAC (Los Angeles Clippers 1984+); two relocations on team_id 1610612746

query_target.sql: SELECT (SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) FROM dim_team WHERE team_id = '1610612746' AND city = 'Buffalo' AND abbreviation = 'BUF') AS buf_row_count, (SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) FROM dim_team WHERE team_id = '1610612746' AND city = 'San Diego' AND abbreviation = 'SDC') AS sdc_row_count, (SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) FROM dim_team WHERE team_id = '1610612746' AND city = 'Los Angeles' AND abbreviation = 'LAC') AS lac_row_count

notes: All three eras (BUF 1970, SDC 1978, LAC 1984) share team_id 1610612746 in dim_team, documenting the franchise's two relocations (BUF→SDC 1978, SDC→LAC 1984). The franchise was founded as the Buffalo Braves in 1970 (separate from the earlier Buffalo Bills of the BAA / 1946-50). CAST(... AS INTEGER) keeps counts as JSON numbers. NOTE: the task spec asked for `query_fn: getTeamIdentity` but no such function exists — using raw_sql per the existing team_identity fixture pattern.
